name: PPT to Video
description: Turn a .pptx into a narrated video: each slide becomes one image clip with a TTS voice-over of the speaker notes. Reuses LibreOffice (soffice) for pptx → png conversion, python-pptx for note extraction, and the avatar-speaker TTS providers for narration.

description_i18n.zh: 把 .pptx 一键转成带配音的视频：每张幻灯片自动转图片，再用 TTS 把演讲者备注读出来，最后拼成 mp4。复用 LibreOffice 转图、python-pptx 抽备注、avatar-speaker 的 TTS 引擎。
description_i18n.en: Turn a .pptx into a narrated video: each slide becomes one image clip with a TTS voice-over of the speaker notes. Reuses LibreOffice (soffice) for pptx -> png conversion, python-pptx for note extraction, and the avatar-speaker TTS providers for narration.

author: OpenAkita
